feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Export Manage Permission Roles detail view
entry.content:
I've seen similar questions being raised, and this far it seems to be an ongoing limitation in SuccessFactors. There seems to be no report & no report domain available that will allow admins to extract a report that will give the granular level of detail you find in Manage Permission Roles --> View role for....

Down to field level and the type of access (view, edit etc.)

This is a constant audit requirement and there appears to be nothing available to allow admins to extract this granular level of information. The available domains described in KBA 2089542 (Different types of RBP reports available in Table Report) does not meet this requirement.

The only way available seems to download the permissions from 'Manage Permission Roles --> View role for....', extract to Excel and manipulate the data from there?

entry.title: Flexible work schedule
entry.content: Could you please advise on the recommended SAP configuration for employees with flexible working schedules, including 8-hour workdays, flexible start times, and two selectable days off per week?

entry.title: Delegation Management permissions: peer users target definition
entry.content:
Hello,

I would need clarification regarding Peer target in RBP Roles.

I understand that the target population "Peer" includes all the users of the same level as the granted user.

In the example above, Managers are granted the access. So I thought "Peers" meant all the other Managers in the system.

But I am limited to team members of the user's manager.

Kind Regards,

Abdelrani

entry.title: REC - Global Interview Scheduling Email
entry.content:
Hello all,

I hope you are doing well 🙂

I am doing the configuration of the interview scheduling in the recruiting module of SuccessFactors in a global client.  They want to implement the interview scheduling for all countries using the same templates for all. I have two questions:

  1. About the email templates content
  2. About the system emails that are sent

1. EMAIL CONTENT | Regarding the face-to-face interview and online meetings, how are you doing with the templates?

  1. Do you have a template for face-to-face interview and other for online meeting, and then the recruiter chooses the right one?
  2. Do you have all the information in the same email and the recruiter changes the template when is sending the email to candidate?
  3. Do you have a global template for all the situations?

The client wants to have a global approach but also wants to make sure that all countries will use the system, so want do you think it is the best approach? 

2. EMAIL TRIGGERS | About the emails that will be sent, this is the system/triggers behave?

  1. When click on "Book this slot for the candidate" - sent the email "Candidate Self-Schedule Interview";
  2. When the recruiter is sending the interview confirmation the "Interview Confirmation to Candidate" template appears (however the recruiter can chooses another one);
  3. When is a meeting teams the system will sent another email with the teams link's.

In this case, if we have a online meeting and the recruiter click on "book this slot for the candidate". The candidate will received 3 emails? 

Thank you for all the help that you could give 🙂

Margarida

SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting

entry.title: Alternative cost center for a wage type generated during a payroll run
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We have received a requirement in which a wage type that is generated directly during a payroll run needs to be assigned to a cost center different from the one specified in Infotype 0001.

We are aware that an alternative cost center can be maintained via Infotype 15. However, since the wage type in question is only created during payroll processing, this option is unfortunately not suitable for our use case.

Are there any other options or places in the system where this assignment can be made?

We have considered adjusting this in the coding, but so far have not been able to identify in which report or at which point the assignment to the cost center takes place.

Does anyone have any ideas or possible solutions?

Thank you very much in advance!

Kind regards,

Olga

entry.title: Latest People Profile
entry.content:
Hi, my client is about to move to the newly released People Profile. However, while testing it Priore to the release I have encountered several issues:

1- Action menu: I no longer can print the profile the option is taken, and when I click on Issuing Letter unable to select a template in order to complete the process and SAVE/Download.

2- HR Tile: after filling up all fields and saving it, tried to click in the URL to download the letter but the system through an error "“The requested operation is not available.” The system displayed an authorization error referencing the /download file request.

3- Overtime: Accessing the Overtime tile resulted in the message: “Looks like something went wrong.” The system diagnostic tooltip stated: Role‑Based Permissions (RBP) security is not enabled for object cust_overtimeconfirmationparent.

4- Work Starting Procedure: Accessing the Work Starting Procedure tile resulted in: Message: “Looks like something went wrong” Error Code: 400.

Seeking the support if any have encountered this issue with the new release

entry.title: Configure the homepage since release 1h2026 in test environment
entry.content:
With the release 1h2026, the homepage display has changed.

However, in "manage home page" and also in "theme manager" the set up is the same.

How do we do to be able to (re)configure as it was

- picture in the banner homepage

- custom quick cards based on permissions groups

entry.title: automate the marriage leave
entry.content:
I need to automate the marriage leave to be requested directly after employee change the Marital Status  to married and the marriage leave start date is the date in Marital Status since or when the employee has a marriage gift on the claim page.

Is there anyone achieve this issue?  Could you support me, please?

entry.title: How to implement Data Privacy and Retention Architecture in Success Factors
entry.content:
Hi Community 

I would like to understand  how data retention rules are configured in your organisations. 

What configuration options are available within SuccessFactors to support retention and deletion
Any constraints or risks we should be aware of
Recommended approach and next steps to move this into delivery

Thanks

entry.title: Free Learning Materials or Courses for SAP HCM for S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm a student and I’m currently preparing a university presentation about SAP HCM for SAP S/4HANA (not SuccessFactors), and I’m honestly struggling to find beginner-friendly learning materials.

Our assignment is less about the technical implementation side and more like a sales/business presentation about SAP HCM for S/4HANA — what the module does, which HR/business processes it supports, how it integrates with other SAP modules, and what advantages or use cases it offers for companies. So we basically need to “sell” SAP HCM in a presentation, even though we are complete beginners with SAP. (Please don’t ask why — that’s simply the assignment)

Everything I find on SAP Learning is focused on SuccessFactors. The HCM learning page on SAP is basically only SuccessFactors content. But our presentation is supposed to cover SAP HCM for SAP S/4HANA.

The problem is:

  • we are complete beginners with SAP
  • the official documentation is too technical for both, learning and a foundation for the presentation
  • the Global Bike case studies we got are a starting point, but nothing more
  • books are very expensive
  • free beginner resources for SAP HCM for S/4HANA seem almost nonexistent
  • the official learning site for S/4HANA covers all modules like Finance, Asset Management, Supply Chain, Sales, but no Human Capital Management
  • the official learning site for HCM covers only SuccessFactors.

From what I understood, SAP HCM for SAP S/4HANA is still supported until 2040, but finding understandable learning material for it is surprisingly difficult.

So I wanted to ask:

  • Are there any good free resources, courses, YouTube channels, blogs, or demo systems for learning SAP HCM basics?
  • Which older SAP ERP HCM materials are still relevant for S/4HANA?
  • What topics would you recommend focusing on for a university presentation aimed at non-SAP people?
  • Any advice for understanding the modules/system architecture without prior SAP knowledge?

At this point even older but still understandable and applicable materials would help a lot.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Night Compensation of 35%
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Environment: in German payroll (German scheme D000), Wageytep MQ30, there is no SAP time management running, processing class 39 für german §3b processing is set.

What I did: I put value in hours to wagetype MQ30 in IT2010. But Function XIT S90 (calculation of tax-free portions) is not reached to calculate taxfree and tax parts correctly.

Question: How to use Wagetype MQ30 correctly, that tax and tax free calculation of night compensation is calculated correctly.

Could you help with any  further wage type customizing?

My MQ30 Customizing:

Kind Regards
Marek

entry.title: Snote Implementation April 2026, 3727345, 3701228, 3727421, 3044762 Snotes
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have implemented 3727345, 3701228, 3727421, 3044762 Snotes in our Dev System. What are the manual changes now we have to do in Payroll Schema and Tables.

What are the manual changes we have to do in Schema and Tables 

Kindly share knowledge

Regards,

Anandhu SS

entry.title: Vacaciones Dignas México
entry.content:
Hola,

Me está pasando un problema con la generación del contingente de vacaciones para México. Tomé como referencia la configuración estándar para el contingente, y este se genera anualmente, pero el cliente necesita que los días de vacaciones se vayan generando mes a mes, para que pueda adelantar vacaciones.

Se logró realizar la configuración, sin embargo, en el mes del aniversario, no considera el día de la fecha de alta, por ejemplo la Fecha de Alta es el 15 de Feb, el 14 de Febrero debería ser el último día de ese período, pero se va hasta fin de mes, y los días de contingente de ese primer año, no salen 12 días, sino 14 días.

Ustedes han hecho esta configuración antes?

entry.title: HR renewal dynamic rules with abap
entry.content:
Hi, has anyone tried to convert dynamic actions (defined in the view T588Z) into dynamic processing rules (DPRs) that are using standard ABAP routines like CALC_VA_DAYS_ON_EXIT in VC_T77PAODYRULE and succeeded?

Does SAP need to deliver the similar classes as the previous ABAP routines?

I'm trying to convert IT0000/06/93/F CALC_VA_DAYS_ON_EXIT(RP2006P0) and I have the error: Operation: 020 Class CALC_VA_DAYS_ON_EXIT(RP2006P0) does not exist 

Thanks

Sérgio

entry.title: Como validar un Hrform por característica HRFOR
entry.content:
Querida comunidad

Hemos diseñado un nuevo HRFORM para visualizar el recibo de pago por EC, actualmente podemos decidir por medio del la característica HRFOR por área de personal PERSK que área puede ver el nuevo diseño y cual no.

El problema que tenemos es que no podemos controlar la fecha de despliegue es decir, aun que mi área de personal que llamare XX tiene derecho a ver el nuevo diseño "Payslip_B" queremos que si el payslip que esta visualizando en EC es menor al año 2026 despliegue el "payslip_A".

Sabemos que EC ejecuta un ODATA para traer el payslip al portal.

Tiene alguna idea de como controlar el despliegue A o B basado en fecha de pago o año periodo de pago?

Gracias

entry.title: PPCI - Error when creating custom OM infotype
entry.content:
Hi,

I have done this so many times but somehow cannot get PPCI to create a custom OM Infotype. I am following the correct steps in creating a new custom OM Infotype but fail to PPCI to create the infotype. I keep on getting an error that "Structure HRI9106 exists" and "R3TR TABL HRI9106 exists" which does not make sense as the structure is required to generate the Infotype. Before i started I made sure that there are no entries in  T778T, T777D, and T777Z and not other structures or programs relating to that Infotype. I have tried using a random high 9 number as well, and it still gives the same error.

https://getsapdone.wordpress.com/2020/06/14/how-to-create-sap-om-infotype/

What am I missing?

Kind Regards

Deon

entry.title: Loan Application enabling from FIRIO with Infotype 0045
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We have a requirement to build a Loan Application in Fiori with workflow process .

and after all approvals the loan request to be updated in the IT0045.

we have built a custom application and try updating IT0045 using Infotype update function module HR_INFOTYPE_OPERATION 

but we are facing some issues.

I would like to understand if there is any standard Loan application in fiori if not is there seperate FM or BADi to update IT0045

entry.title: Enabling latest career worksheet in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
What should be the correct procedure to enable latest career worksheet?

As per the SAP document, these are the pre-requisites:

  1. Career Worksheet V12 is enabled in provisioning.
  2. Migrated to TIH and GF
  3. OM is enabled in provisioning

In the preview system, TIH and GF is already enabled. How to ensure that OM is enabled in provisioning and perform the rest of the upgrade. Is there anything available in the check tool?

Please respond to this 🙂

entry.title: Request for Insights: SuccessFactors RCM vs SmartRecruiters for PSU Recruiting
entry.content:
Dear All,

I would like to initiate a discussion on identifying the most suitable recruiting solution for Indian PSU implementations—specifically evaluating SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting Management (RCM) versus SmartRecruiters.

Considering the complexity and regulatory nature of PSU recruitment processes—such as reservation policies, audit requirements, large-scale hiring, and compliance-driven workflows—it is important that we assess which platform aligns best with these needs.

Additionally, with ongoing and upcoming innovations expected to be focused more on the SmartRecruiters platform, it becomes even more relevant to evaluate its suitability in comparison to RCM in the PSU context.

I request everyone to share their insights, experiences, and recommendations to help us arrive at a well-informed approach.

Looking forward to your valuable inputs.

Best regards,
Aravind

entry.title: Sailpoint to HCM Hire Action not working
entry.content:
Hello, 

Our connection from Sailpoint to HCM (on RISE) works for all updating actions except for the "Hire" action.  The connection to an HCM environment not on RISE works for all actions including hire. 

Has anyone else encountered this?

Thanks!
